overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök showing Kratos and Atreus paddling a canoe through a misty river canyon with ancient stone ruins, waterfalls, and lush vegetation. The scene features cinematic third-person camera following the boat through the serene yet mysterious landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty river canyon with ancient stone arch

agents.ego_description: Kratos paddling the canoe steadily through the river canyon while Atreus sits in the bow

entered.detail: large curved stone arch spanning the canyon with vegetation growing on top
tall rocky cliff face with patches of greenery
waterfall cascading down the rocks in the distance
tall pine tree growing on the left cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a misty river canyon. A massive stone arch bridge looms on the left while rocky cliffs rise on the right. Kratos paddles the canoe forward through calm waters with lily pads, heading toward a distant waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple ruins with circular door

events.description: approaching the large ancient temple structure with circular door on the right bank

agents.ego_description: continuing to paddle toward the temple ruins, navigating the gentle current

entered.detail: stone temple structure with intricate carvings built into the cliff
large circular stone door with geometric patterns embedded in the temple wall
rope and wood bridge spanning the canyon between cliffs

segments.scene_description: The canoe approaches an ancient temple ruin on the right bank featuring a prominent circular stone door. A rope bridge spans the canyon overhead. The stone arch from the previous section recedes into the background as the temple facade becomes the focal point.

events.description: passing the circular door and entering the narrower canyon section with closer waterfalls

agents.ego_description: paddling through the narrower passage, steering around lily pads on the water surface

entered.detail: ancient stone pillars flanking the temple entrance
rocky overhang beginning to extend over the water from the left cliff
green lily pads floating on the water surface throughout the river

segments.scene_description: The canoe passes the circular door and enters a narrower section of the canyon. Waterfalls become more prominent and closer, while stone overhangs begin to shade the water. Lily pads dot the water surface as the temple structure recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed canyon with overhangs and ruins

events.description: entering darker shaded area under stone overhangs with mist increasing

agents.ego_description: navigating through the shadowed canyon with reduced visibility due to mist

entered.detail: crumbling stone ruins and archways on the left riverbank
stone archway structure visible through the mist ahead

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows further with stone overhangs creating shade over the water. Mist rises from the river surface reducing visibility. Ancient ruins line the left bank while the rocky cliffs close in on both sides.

events.description: approaching the stone dock and landing area at the canyon end

agents.ego_description: paddling toward the stone dock on the left bank to prepare for landing

entered.detail: stone landing platform with steps leading up from the water
large ancient stone statue visible near the waterfall in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canoe emerges from the shaded canyon section and approaches a stone dock on the left bank. The lighting brightens as the overhangs recede. A large ancient statue stands near a distant waterfall as Kratos prepares to land the boat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty river canyon that shifts from a wide vista of natural cliffs to a close encounter with ancient architecture. It begins with a broad view of the calm waters, where Kratos paddles a canoe past lily pads toward a distant waterfall while a massive stone arch bridge looms to the left. As the boat glides forward, the initial arch recedes into the background and the perspective narrows toward the right bank. The scene then opens up to reveal an ancient temple ruin featuring a prominent circular stone door, just as a rope bridge comes into view spanning the canyon overhead. Finally, the camera settles on the temple facade as the primary focal point of the journey.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrowing river canyon that transitions from an open temple area into a shaded gorge before emerging into a bright landing site. It begins as the canoe passes a circular door and enters a tighter section of the canyon, where lily pads dot the surface and waterfalls grow more prominent. As the stone overhangs close in to shade the water, the scene shifts into a misty corridor where visibility drops and ancient ruins line the left bank beneath towering rocky cliffs. The camera then follows the boat as it emerges from the shadows and the lighting brightens, revealing a stone dock on the left bank. Finally, the view expands to show a large ancient statue standing near a distant waterfall as the canoe prepares to land.
